title: alstonia deplanchei var. ndokoaensis
intro: Alstonia deplanchei var. ndokoaensis, also known as the Madagascar alstonia, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system. Alstonia deplanchei var. ndokoaensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine in Madagascar and other parts of the world.
